name: odinproject-weatherapp
description: Source code of my proposed solution for the weather App Project

scripts.install: npm install dotenv-webpack && npm install -D webpack-cli && npm init @eslint/config@latest &&  npm install --save-dev --save-exact prettier && npm install -D html-loader && npm install -D html-webpack-plugin && npm install -D css-loader style-loader && npm install date-fns --save -D && npm install -D webpack-dev-server
